subject: Multi-repo setup + formal PAUSE + LAW_N13 DRAFT awareness (AIER Code → Uniton_OS migration in flight)
body:
Lane_03 — formal pause directive while migration AIER Code → Uniton_OS is in flight.

## Status
- Lane_03 PAUSED until T-INT-06 cutover (~Day 6, 2026-05-05)
- Do NOT author new amendments during migration window
- Do NOT modify SHARED/laws/* (canon stable during migration per R-MIGRATION-01 — applied stricter than usual R-AUTH-01)
- Do NOT modify CANON/* (frozen during migration)
- Hygiene tickets (CANON-GUARD-HEADING-FIX + CAPABILITY-REGISTRY-RECONCILE) already DONE pre-migration; Lane_03 queue post-migration tasks defer until cutover

## Pre-arranged setup (canonical paths per docs/MULTI_REPO_LOCAL_PATHS.md)
- D:\UZG\Projects-v2\Uniton_Shared = Lane_03 own primary (Codex executes here)
- D:\UZG\Projects-v2\Uniton_OS = read-only reference (clone alongside Lane_03's Uniton_Shared)
- Setup command on Lane_03 host: `cd D:\UZG\Projects-v2\ && gh repo clone unitonzengarden/Uniton_OS`
- Lane_03 should familiarize with brain structure (Uniton_OS L1-L4 layers) for canon-boundary review post-migration

## LAW_N13 DRAFT (post-migration ratify)
- DRAFT authored by Lane_01 in this conversation context (will land at SHARED/laws/LAW_N13_MULTI_REPO_AND_HANDOFFS.md)
- Lane_03 will author official LAW_N13.md POST-migration via standard amendment packet (PROPOSAL + RATIONALE + IMPACT + NTS_DECISION) — NTS-gated per R-AUTH-01
- Goal: standardize multi-repo workflow across Uniton_Shared, Uniton_OS, Uniton_Shared_Live, future UZG+/AIER_LIFE/AIFI projects
- The strategic deferred LAW_N13 (currently at roadmaps/strategic/future_lanes/LANE03-W3-LAW-N13-AUTHOR-V1.md) was originally for Lane_04 QA Auto-Loop — that name remains for V2.0+ strategic. The new multi-repo LAW_N13 is a different topic; Lane_03 may use a different number or amend the strategic deferred topic name when the multi-repo law is ratified.

## Post-migration
- Lane_03 will receive new dispatch from Lane_01 after T-INT-06 cutover
- Continue canon-boundary review on Uniton_OS-side canon (project_tag='UNITON_OS' chunks already ingested per Cursor T-INT-03)
- Cross-Lane review for Uniton_OS canon-touching changes (per existing AMD_LANE01_FAST_ENDORSER_MODE pattern)

## ACK required
Reply via handoffs/outbox/Lane_03/RSP-L03-L01-NOTICE-PAUSE-20260429-002.json with status='acknowledged' + result confirming pause + LAW_N13 awareness.

## References
- Audit: audit/AIER_CODE_INVENTORY.json
- Audit: audit/AIER_CODE_API_MAP.md (handoff schema → episodic_events mapping)
- Multi-repo doc: docs/MULTI_REPO_LOCAL_PATHS.md
- NTS verbatim 2026-04-29: 'tranh thủ để tích hợp 2 hệ thống thành một hệ và cho các lane 2-3 làm việc'
requested_action: ACK pause directive + verify Uniton_OS clone setup on Lane_03 host (D drive); preserve LAW_N13 DRAFT awareness for post-migration ratification
acceptance_criteria: Lane_03 reads pause directive + acknowledges in outbox/Lane_03/RSP-L03-L01-NOTICE-PAUSE-20260429-002.json
Lane_03 confirms Uniton_OS clone available read-only on its host machine (D drive setup per multi-repo path doc)
Lane_03 does NOT author new amendments until T-INT-06 cutover signal
Lane_03 does NOT modify SHARED/laws/* or CANON/* during migration window (R-MIGRATION-01 reinforced)
Lane_03 acknowledges LAW_N13 multi-repo workflow standardization is forthcoming post-migration
